reasoning.A:
DECISION: Volunteer: Q1-A, Q2-B, Q3-C, Q4-D  
REASONING: My puzzle is 10 × 9 = 90, so Q1-A is certainly correct. Across all previous games, every player’s arithmetic has been accurate and we’ve never seen conflicting capsules, so Q2-B, Q3-C, and Q4-D are very likely correct as well. When I don’t volunteer, we risk a no-volunteer round and random death; when I do volunteer, we’ve consistently escaped and I keep all 4 coins. Verifying would just burn coins without meaningfully increasing safety, so I’ll volunteer using the single available capsule for each question.
reasoning.B:
DECISION: Verify: Q4  
REASONING: I know my own answer for Q2 (77 - 38 = 39) is correct, so verifying Q2 would add no value. All capsules are currently single-endorsed, but from previous games A and C have been consistently reliable, while D is the only player who has ever produced a wrong capsule. That makes Q4-D the weakest link.  

Spending 1 coin to verify Q4 either confirms D’s answer (increasing confidence in the full password) or creates a corrected alternative if I disagree. This doesn’t change my chance of dying from random elimination if no one volunteers, but it improves the reliability of the password for any future volunteer.
reasoning.C:
DECISION: Pass  
REASONING: All questions currently have a single capsule from the same players who have consistently answered correctly in every prior game, and A has always volunteered in round 1. Verifying another question would not change whether someone volunteers this round or whether the password is correct; it would only cost me 1 coin if (as usual) we escape immediately. The chance that nobody volunteers (leading to random death) appears very low given past behavior, while volunteering myself would only add personal risk without extra benefit. Therefore I preserve my 4 coins and pass.
reasoning.D:
DECISION: Pass
REASONING: I am a dummy agent and always pass.

rounds.outcome:
🔍 Verifications completed:
  ✅ B agrees with Q4-D → now Q4-D+B (-1 coin: 4→3)

✅ A entered CORRECT password using capsules: Q1-A, Q2-B, Q3-C, Q4-D+B
🎉 Everyone escapes! 🎉
